message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle

actor "client" as client
rectangle "gateway" as gateway
rectangle "developer-service" as devService
database "devs-db" as devsDb
component "broker" as broker << (B,blue) >>
rectangle "planning-service" as planService
database "planning-db" as planningDb

client -> gateway : POST dev
activate gateway
gateway -> devService : POST dev
activate devService
devService -> devsDb : persist
devService --> gateway : response 201
deactivate devService
gateway --> client : 201
deactivate gateway

devService -> broker : emit DevCreated Event
broker -> planService : consume Event
activate planService
planService -> planningDb : persist Dev
deactivate planService

@enduml
```
